recommendations.title: The Party
recommendations.overview: A thirteen-year-old French girl deals with moving to a new city and school in Paris, while at the same time her parents are getting a divorce.

recommendations.title: Sex and the City
recommendations.overview: A New York writer on sex and love is finally getting married to her Mr. Big. But her three best girlfriends must console her after one of them inadvertently leads Mr. Big to jilt her.

recommendations.title: Bareilly Ki Barfi
recommendations.overview: Bitti Mishra is a bohemian Bareilly girl who falls deeply in love with Pritam Vidrohi, an author because she admires his progressive way of thinking. Finding him though proves to be as hard as looking for a needle in the haystack. So Bitti seeks the

recommendations.title: A Little Thing Called Love
recommendations.overview: An introverted young girl falls in love with a popular senior. However, as she begins to come out of her shell, she faces several new problems.
recommendations.director: Wasin Pokpong, Puttipong Promsaka Na Sakolnakorn

recommendations.title: Manhattan
recommendations.overview: Manhattan explores how the life of a middle-aged television writer dating a teenage girl is further complicated when he falls in love with his best friend's mistress.

recommendations.title: Say It Isn't So
recommendations.overview: Boy meets girl; boy falls in love (and had wild, non-stop sex) with girl; boy loses girl... when they discover they are brother and sister! But when he learns that he's the victim of the ultimate case of mistaken identity, the lovesick young man -- w

recommendations.title: Playing It Cool
recommendations.overview: A young man meets and instantly falls in love with an engaged woman.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: Camille
recommendations.overview: A twisted honeymoon adventure about a young couple on their way to Niagara Falls.

recommendations.title: Everything, Everything
recommendations.overview: A teenager who's lived a sheltered life because she's allergic to everything, falls for the boy who moves in next door.
